data.biography: 邢恩本名邢雅晨，出生于福建福州，小时候喜欢看的漫画和小说，都是带有武侠元素的。而身高173公分的她在就读福建农林大学艺术园林学院时，便加入了女子篮球校队，加上外表比一般男生还要帅气，因此成为学校的风云人物。 2015年，邢雅晨被签进唐人影视，成为胡歌、娜扎的师妹，并在出席品牌活动时宣告正式以艺名“邢恩”出道。
data.name: 邢恩

data.biography:
邢恩本名邢雅晨，出生於福建福州，小時候喜歡看的漫畫和小説，都是帶有武俠元素的。而身高 173 公分的她在就讀福建農林大學藝術園林學院時，便加入了女子籃球校隊，加上外表比一般男生還要帥氣，因此成為學校的風雲人物。

2015 年，邢雅晨被籤進唐人影視，成為胡歌、娜紮的師妹，並在出席品牌活動時宣告正式以藝名“邢恩”出道。
data.name: 邢恩

data.biography:
洪朝丰（英语：Hung Chiu Fung，1960年1月5日－），生于中国大陆，祖籍广东潮州，曾为香港数码广播有限公司节目主持人。2016年7月移居法国巴黎。

洪朝丰有四姊一兄，早年于九龙油塘湾徙置区成长。他原名是“洪乌猪”，因他生在猪栏之上，其兄原名“洪狗仔”。后来幼稚园老师为他俩兄弟分别改名为“洪朝光”及“洪朝丰”。。洪朝丰是香港的电台节目主持人，也曾是电视节目主持，其主持电台节目《日月星辰》而成为数年十大最受欢迎电台节目主持。
data.name: 洪朝丰

data.biography:
洪朝豐，生於中國大陸，祖籍廣東潮州，曾為香港數碼廣播有限公司節目主持人。2016 年 7 月移居法國巴黎。

洪朝豐有四姊一兄，早年於九龍油塘灣徙置區 19 座成長，父親於區內經營電器店。洪朝豐原名「洪烏豬」，因他生在豬欄之上，其兄原名「洪狗仔」。後來幼稚園老師為他倆兄弟分別改名為「洪朝光」及「洪朝豐」。。洪朝豐是香港的電台節目主持人，也曾是電視節目主持，其主持電台節目《日月星辰》而成為數年十大最受歡迎電台節目主持。
data.name: 洪朝豐

data.biography:
Nancy Wu Ting-Yan (Chinese: 胡定欣), born on 9 September 1981, is a Hong Kong actress under contract with TVB.

She began her entertainment career in 1999 by placing fourth in TVB’s 18th Annual New Talent Singing Awards. In 2001, she competed in TVB’s 3rd Annual Cover Girl Competition, where she swept several titles, including Most Photogenic, Most Fit, Most Attractive, and Overall Winner. Following her success, she joined the 18th TVB Acting Class, officially launching her acting career.

In November 2012, Nancy was honored with a Long Service Award from TVB for her contributions to the company. That same year, she received multiple accolades for her performances, including My Favourite Supporting Actress at the TVB Star Awards Malaysia, recognition at the Asian Television Awards, and Best Supporting Actress at the TVB Anniversary Awards.
data.name: Nancy Wu

data.biography: 胡定欣，2001年参加无线电视艺员训练班，2004年正式签约香港电视广播有限公司，成为旗下艺员。因《大唐双龙传》而被大众熟知，出演过《刑警》、《冲上云霄II》等多部电视剧。2008年获”万千星辉颁奖典礼“飞跃进步女艺员。2012年凭《拳王》中丁恩慈一角夺得第17届亚洲电视大奖最佳女配角、2012年度万千星辉颁奖典礼最佳女配角及Astro华丽台电视剧大奖我的最爱电视女配角奖 。2015年12月13日，在TVB万千星辉颁奖礼上获最佳女主角奖。2016年10月22日，凭《城寨英雄》一举拿下2016星和无线电视大奖我最爱TVB女主角。2016年12月18日，胡定欣凭借《城寨英雄》荣获万千星辉颁奖典礼2016最佳女主角奖，也是连续两年获得这一奖项。
data.name: 胡定欣

data.biography: 胡定欣，香港女藝人、演員、廣告模特兒及節目主持人，現為無綫電視部頭合約藝員兼邵氏兄弟藝員，曾聯續兩年在萬千星輝頒獎典禮奪得「最佳女主角」獎。
data.name: 胡定欣

data.biography:
林韦辰，香港演员、主持人、艺人高尔夫协会副会长，1985年毕业于无线艺员进修班。

1989年出演《义不容情》，1992年出演《大时代》，1995年加入亚洲电视，1994年在《今日睇真D》等节目担任主持，1997年出演《再见艳阳天》、《南海十三郎》等剧集。

1999年回到无线电视，出演《楚汉骄雄》等多部剧集广受好评。2004年重回亚洲电视，出演《情陷夜中环》等剧集，并担任亚洲电视重大活动的司仪  。2013年和亚洲电视约满，北上发展，在电视剧《兰陵王妃》中担当主要角色。
data.name: 林韦辰

data.biography:
林韋辰，香港演員、主持人、藝人高爾夫協會副會長，1985 年畢業於無線藝員進修班。

1989 年出演《義不容情》，1992 年出演《大時代》，1995 年加入亞洲電視，1994 年在《今日睇真 D》等節目擔任主持，1997 年出演《再見豔陽天》、《南海十三郎》等劇集。

1999 年回到無線電視，出演《楚漢驕雄》等多部劇集廣受好評。2004 年重回亞洲電視，出演《情陷夜中環》等劇集，並擔任亞洲電視重大活動的司儀 。2013 年和亞洲電視約滿，北上發展，在電視劇《蘭陵王妃》中擔當主要角色。
data.name: 林韋辰

data.biography: John Marrs is an American actor currently based in Tombstone Arizona. His rugged looks and ability to handle guns and horses have led to many roles in western movies. This multi-talented former lawman and soldier started out in films as a technical advisor and firearms instructor. It wasn't long before he found his way in front of the camera. Besides acting, he enjoys working on other aspect of film making. He has credits as horse wrangler, armorer, writer and assistant director, to name a few.
data.name: John Marrs

data.biography:
Avan Tudor Jogia (/ˈævən ˈdʒoʊɡiə/; born February 9, 1992) is a Canadian actor, singer, author and director. He first received recognition for portraying Danny Araujo in the television film A Girl Like Me: The Gwen Araujo Story (2006). After moving to the United States in his late teens, he landed various television roles on television series such as Caprica (2009–2010) and, famously, Victorious (2010–2013).

Jogia rose to mainstream prominence for his roles as Danny Desai in the drama series Twisted (2013), Tutankhamun in the miniseries Tut (2015), Roman Mercer in the paranormal action series Ghost Wars (2017–2018) and Ulysses Zane in the comedy series Now Apocalypse (2019). Numerous credits in television and cinema include Spectacular! (2009), Finding Hope Now (2010), Rags (2012), Ten Thousand Saints (2015), I Am Michael (2015) and Zombieland: Double Tap (2019). His directorial debut came in 2011 with the short film Alex. He stars as Leon S. Kennedy in the 2021 film Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City.

In 2011, Jogia co-founded the LGBT online organisation Straight But Not Narrow, which seeks to shape the viewpoints of teenagers and adults on matters related to the LGBT community. In 2019, he published his first book, Mixed Feelings, a series of short stories and poems about multiracial identity. He hand-painted all the illustrations in the book. His second book of poetry, "Autopsy (Of an Ex-Teen Heartthrob): Poems of Love, Rage, Sex and Sadness", was released on February 11, 2025.

Jogia and his brother Ketan make up the band Saint Ivory. They released an album to complement the book, also titled Mixed Feelings. Jogia plays guitar, piano, and accordion, as well as sings.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Avan Jogia, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Avan Jogia

data.biography:
Avan Jogia（1992 年 2 月 9 日出生）是一位加拿大演员，以在 Victorious 中扮演 Beck Oliver 而闻名。

他在电影表演学校接受了屡获殊荣的表演教练克尔斯滕·克拉克森（Kirsten Clarkson）的指导和培训，他帮助他取得了令人难以置信的职业生涯。https://www.screenactingschool.com/
data.name: 阿万·乔贾

data.biography:
💥Эван Тюдор Джогиа. Родился в 1992-ом году в Ванкувере, Канада. Был единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал бизнесменом, а мать была менеджером. Учился в средней школе Килларни в Ванкувере. Работает актёром, режиссёром и продюсером. С 2023-го состоит в отношениях с певицей Холзи, детей у пары нет

🏆Главные награды🏆: Номинация на Teen Choice Awards (2013) [Социопат]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Виктория-победительница» (2010), «Zомбилэнд: Контрольный выстрел» (2019), «Выбери любовь» (2023), «Обитель зла» (2021), «Социопат» (2013)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Эван имеет индийские, английские и валлийские корни
data.name: Эван Джогиа

data.biography: Gavin Spokes est un acteur britannique. Il est surtout connu pour son rôle dans la pièce She Stoops to Conquer, en 2012, et celui dans la série Utopia, de Dennis Kelly (2013).

Michael Bowen (born June 21, 1953) is an American actor. Films he has appeared in include Jackie Brown, Magnolia, and Less Than Zero. Bowen also had a recurring role as Danny Pickett on the ABC television series, Lost.

Bowen (also credited as Michael Bowen Jr.) was born to actress Sonia Sorel (1921–2004) and Beat painter Michael Bowen. He is half-brother to Robert and Keith Carradine. His nieces are actresses Martha Plimpton and Ever Carradine.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Michael Bowen, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography: Gong Seung-Yeon, born Yoo Seung-Yeon, is a South Korean actress. She initially trained as a singer for seven years under the company SM Entertainment but left after losing interest in singing. She made her tv debut in 2012 with I Love Lee Tae-Ri. She has also worked in music videos, show hosting, and as an honorary ambassador in 2014 for the Korean National Tuberculosis Association and in 2016 for the 8th DMZ International Documentary Film Festival. She's the older sister of Yoo Jeong-Yeon, a member of the girl group Twice.
data.name: Gong Seung-yeon

data.biography: Гун Син-Йон - південнокорейська акторка та модель.

Gong Seung Yeon, rodným jménem Yoo Seung Yeon, je jihokorejská herečka. Je starší sestrou zpěvačky Yoo Jeong Yeon ze skupiny TWICE. Poprvé se vypracovala na zpěvačku pod společností SM Entertainment poté, co v roce 2005 vyhrála část soutěže "Best Looks" v soutěži SM Teen Best. V roce 2012 oficiálně debutovala jako modelka pro reklamu "White" společnosti Yuhan-Kimberly. Poté debutovala jako herečka v seriálu "I Love Italy". V roce 2015 na sebe jako relativní nováček upozornila, když se zapojila do čtvrté série korejské reality show We Got Married, kde tvořila pár se zpěvákem a hercem Lee Jong Hyunem.

Získala několik ocenění. Stala se čestnou velvyslankyní "Korejské národní asociace pro tuberkulózu" (2014) a "8. mezinárodního festivalu dokumentárních filmů DMZ" (2016).  V roce 2018 také nazpívala OST k filmu "My Dream Class", Like a Star (s Yoo Jeong-yeon). Podílela se také na muzikálech a divadelních dílech: "Porgy a Bess jako Clara" (2011), respektive "Král Lear jako princezna Goneril" (2011).
孔升妍（朝鲜语：공승연 Gong Seung Yeon，1993年2月27日－），本名俞昇延（朝鲜语：유승연），韩国女演员。父亲俞昌俊是资深韩国餐厅主厨，母亲在阿姨开的日本餐厅工作。二妹是圈外人。小妹为JYP娱乐旗下女团TWICE成员俞定延，两人2016年7月至隔年1月曾一起为SBS《人气歌谣》担任主持人。此外：她们的亲家表妹是KARD全昭珉。
data.name: 孔升妍

data.biography: 孔升妍（朝鮮語：공승연 Gong Seung Yeon，1993 年 2 月 27 日－），本名俞昇延（朝鮮語：유승연），韓國女演員。父親俞昌俊是資深韓國餐廳主廚，母親在阿姨開的日本餐廳工作。二妹是圈外人。小妹為 JYP 娛樂旗下女團 TWICE 成員俞定延，兩人 2016 年 7 月至隔年 1 月曾一起為 SBS《人氣歌謠》擔任主持人。此外：她們的親家表妹是 KARD 全昭珉。
data.name: 孔升妍

data.overview: Hương Vị Tình Nhân - The Aroma of Affection kể về hành trình minh oan và tìm kiếm hạnh phúc của Malee sau khi mẹ cô bị hàm oan và qua đời. Nhờ tài chế tạo hương liệu đặc biệt, cô gặp gỡ quan trẻ Luang-Inn người không chỉ cứu mạng mà còn cùng cô lật tẩy âm mưu của kẻ thủ ác Sriprai, vượt qua những rào cản gia tộc để tạo nên một đoạn tình duyên sâu sắc.

data.biography: Daisuke Namikawa is a Japanese actor, voice actor and singer. He is sometimes mistaken for fellow voice actor Daisuke Hirakawa, as their names only differ by one character when written in kanji. Despite his wide range of voice casting, he is usually cast as young, kind heroes.
data.name: Daisuke Namikawa

data.biography:
Daisuke Namikawa (浪川 大輔, Namikawa Daisuke, nacido el 2 de abril de 1976) es un seiyū (actor de doblaje), actor y cantante japonés de Tokio. Director ejecutivo de Stay Luck. A pesar de su amplia gama de voces, generalmente se le presenta como héroes jóvenes y amables.

Tras su buena actuación doblando a Elliot, el personaje principal de E.T., recibió más ofertas para continuar trabajando doblando películas. Apareció en una serie de películas populares como La historia interminable y Los Goonies. Desde entonces, ha participado en la industria doblando otras películas populares extranjeras, así como anime. Perteneció a varias agencias: Komadori, Haikyō y Across Entertainment, hasta que decidió formar su propia agencia Stay Luck.
data.name: Daisuke Namikawa

data.biography: 浪川大輔是日本男性聲優。東京都出身。
data.name: 浪川大輔

data.biography: Daisuke Namikawa è un attore, doppiatore e cantante giapponese. Viene talvolta confuso per il suo collega doppiatore Daisuke Hirakawa, dato che i loro nomi differiscono solo per un carattere quando scritti in kanji. Nonostante la sua ampia gamma di voci, di solito viene scelto per interpretare eroi giovani e gentili.
data.name: Daisuke Namikawa

data.overview: Sinh ra đã bị thời gian kết án, chàng trai họ Trần mang theo hơi thở mong manh bước ra khỏi núi hoang, chọn đối diện vận mệnh thay vì chờ nó khép lại. Một thân bệnh tật, một lòng không khuất phục, đó là hành trang duy nhất khi hắn tiến vào trung tâm quyền lực của thiên hạ, nơi kẻ yếu chỉ là quân cờ. Thế cuộc không dung người trái ý. Một mối ràng buộc từ quá khứ khiến hắn trở thành mục tiêu, bị đẩy khỏi ánh đèn danh vọng, lưu đày vào nơi hoang phế. Chính tại chốn bị quên lãng ấy,  hắn lật mở cổ điển thất truyền, lấy tri thức xưa làm đuốc, từng bước dò đường giữa bóng tối. Giữa chiến địa phong kín, hắn gặp lại người con gái mang dung nhan phượng hoàng dưới lớp ngụy trang. Hai người kề vai trong máu lửa, lấy sinh tử vá lại niềm tin, đập tan mưu đồ hắc ám.

production_companies.name: iQIYI High Energy Studio 爱奇艺高能工作室

data.biography:
Cindy Myskiw, is a Canadian Actor, Producer, Director, Writer. She's had 2 speaking roles now in Hallmark Movies. She was involved in the Co-Creation of a Talk Show called "Big Talk" which she also Directed, Produced and Co-Hosted. "Big Talk" which aired on Shaw Spotlight TV. She Directed/wrote and acted in her first show film "A Prairie Christmas" She played Mrs. Karen Grimsley on the award-winning television series Millworth. Millworth won first place for a Narrative at the Real to Reel Film Festival in 2016. She Directed 2 Episodes and Produced Several as well as being in charge of hiring and placing all Background in 8 episodes. She produced and acted in "Rage Can Kill" which just won one of the 8 MB ACTRA MIP Grants. Born Cindy Rose Durocher, Daughter of Rene and Jane Durocher, the 5 child of 7 other siblings. She had a difficult childhood with divorced parents in her early teens. But she feels all her trials and tribulations have helped form her into the person that she is today. She has been married for 38 years (yes to the same man lol) and they have 4 children. Two are theirs biologically and 2 are adopted. She started acting back in 2004/5 with a community theatre group. That is where she fell in love with acting and started looking at it in a more professional level.

Director Statement: "My desire to create work in the Winnipeg Film/Television industry is strong. We are a talented group of people in Manitoba." By: Cindy Myskiw
data.name: Cindy Rose Myskiw
